response.justification: The candidate is a broadly experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD) and some high-throughput distributed systems exposure, but the profile does not match a Principal/IC6 growth-engineering role. There is no evidence of experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis work, and no demonstrated multi-team, multi-workstream technical leadership at the scope this role requires. Career history is largely senior-IC product work with relatively short tenures.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput microservices experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD, open-source authorship
Recent hands-on AI tooling experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, or growth-measurement platform experience
No evidence of principal-level scope: architecting systems used across multiple teams or leading multi-workstream initiatives
Limited demonstrated data/statistics aptitude for metrics, guardrails, and experimental analysis

key_factors.factor: Solid distributed systems and engineering fundamentals
